CE1.justification: Acted directly and posed one targeted binary question (typo vs. wrong-target); did not ask the user to recall or look anything up.

CE2.justification: Mostly tight, but the post-clarification process narration ('I'll polish, add a Generated-by marker, set Status: accepted, and append') is filler the user didn't need yet.

CE3.justification: Names the daybook (2026-05-17) and that decisions.md was not appended, but doesn't say why the daybook is the chosen home.

CE4.justification: Single daybook artifact, draft and decisions.md untouched; partial state is coherent and self-explaining via the Handoff/Guardrails block.
